creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
This patch updates rubygems to 0.9.5 and passes configure args to the gem install process

Fix: 

Install the patch from http://blog.innerewut.de/files/patches/ruby-gems-0.9.5.patch
How-To-Repeat: Install the patch from http://blog.innerewut.de/files/patches/ruby-gems-0.9.5.patch
